response.justification: Strong software engineer with 16+ years of experience and a demonstrated track record of systems-level thinking and performance optimization. Meets the minimum Bachelor's + 8 years qualification threshold. However, the resume shows no evidence of the core technical expertise required for this role: SoC and IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, deep neural network workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design at the accelerator level. Her background is in full-stack software development and web services, not the hardware-focused performance architecture this Principal role demands.
strengths: 16+ years of progressive software engineering experience with demonstrated systems thinking and technical depth
Proven expertise in performance optimization and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Current exposure to AI infrastructure and modern ML engineering workflows at re:cinq
concerns: No evidence of SoC or IP modeling experience, which is a core responsibility of the role
Career trajectory centered on full-stack/web development rather than hardware architecture or hardware-software co-design
No demonstrated GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or deep learning workload optimization expertise

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP modeling and GPU architecture expertise gap
Current AI infrastructure work provides some modern context
